title: Jackson Crossing @ Watters Creek
location: Watters Creek at Montgomery Farm, 970 Garden Park Dr, Allen, TX 75013, USA
description:
Location: Watters Creek at Montgomery Farm

US 75 & Bethany Road
Allen, TX 75013
Performance Fee: $500
Fee is payable upon performance. Fee will be paid via company check.

Attire is to be: Upscale casual

Lighting will be provided via one (1) tripod light.

Sound board will not be provided. 

Food or Drink will not be provided—Artist may bring bottled water.

Please note we are a non-smoking property with a zero tolerance. We do not allow outside food on our green. 

Please keep all lyrics family friendly.

Artist to load in and complete any sound check required a minimum of one (1) hour prior to performance.

Performance to start promptly at the above indicated time.

Artist will take two (2) ten minute breaks between extended sets and will come prepared to provide background music during break via, iPod.

SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS: Watters Creek is an outdoor venue. The management of Watters Creek reserves the right to cancel this agreement due to inclement weather up to noon the day of the performance without monetary penalty. Once on site and if inclement weather is reasonable threat, Artist has the authority to judge unsafe performance condition. Upon such notification, the management of Watters Creek must move the performance indoors or forfeit this performance and full payment of the performance fee.

The management of Watters Creek reserves the right to terminate this agreement with appropriate notice up to (7) seven days prior to performance without penalty.

ARTIST IS RESPONSIBLE FOR PROVIDING ALL BACKLINE, I.E., PERCUSSION, GUITAR AND/OR KEYBOARD AMPS AND ANY OTHER EQUIPMENT OR MUSICAL INSTRUMENTS NEEDED FOR THE PERFORMANCE.
